---
title: "project2"
output: html_document
---

### Install Necessary Packages

```{r}
BiocManager::install("GEOquery")
library(GEOquery)
library(limma)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(tibble)
```
### Load dataset from GEO

```{r}
# download GEO dataset and return it as an ExpressionSet
gset <- getGEO("GSE120490", GSEMatrix =TRUE, getGPL=FALSE)

# select the ExpressionSet corresponding to the GPL570 microarray platform
if (length(gset) > 1) idx <- grep("GPL570", attr(gset, "names")) else idx <- 1
gset <- gset[[idx]]

# get metadata table and expression matrix (rows as genes and columns as samples) 
meta <- pData(gset)
ex <- exprs(gset)
```
### Annotate microarray expression data with gene symbols

```{r}
# download GEO platform record for GPL570 and extract annotation table
gpl <- getGEO("GPL570", destdir=".") 
gpl_annot <- Table(gpl)

# annotate expression data with gene symbols
ex_annotated <- as.data.frame(ex)
ex_annotated$gene_symbol <- gpl_annot$`Gene Symbol`[match(rownames(ex_annotated), gpl_annot$ID)]

# handle probes that map to multiple genes
ex_clean <- ex_annotated %>%
  # remove any leading/trailing whitespace
  mutate(gene_symbol = str_trim(gene_symbol)) %>%
  # split multiple genes by " /// "
  separate_rows(gene_symbol, sep = "\\s*///\\s*") %>%
  # remove any empty strings (in case)
  filter(gene_symbol != "")

# collapse multiple probes per gene by taking the one with max expression
ex_final <- ex_clean %>%
  group_by(gene_symbol) %>%
  summarise(across(where(is.numeric), max)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  column_to_rownames("gene_symbol")
```

### Perform differential expression analysis
```{r}
# Convert expression data to matrix for limma
expr_limma <- as.matrix(ex_final)

# Define design and contrast
group <- factor(meta$characteristics_ch1)
design <- model.matrix(~ 0 + group)
colnames(design) <- make.names(levels(group))

contrast.matrix <- makeContrasts(
  Yes_vs_No = matastasis..No - matastasis..Yes,
  levels = colnames(design)
)

# Fit limma model
fit <- lmFit(expr_limma, design)
fit2 <- contrasts.fit(fit, contrast.matrix)
fit2 <- eBayes(fit2)

# Extract results
deg_results <- topTable(fit2, coef=1, adjust="BH", number=Inf)
```


### Write all necessary matrices to output files
```{r}
# Sample metadata (phenotype data)
write.csv(meta, file = "gset_pheno.csv", row.names = TRUE)
write.csv(ex, file = "expression_matrix.csv", row.names = TRUE)
write.csv(deg_results, file = "deg_results.csv", row.names = TRUE)
write.csv(ex_final, file = "annotated_expression.csv", row.names = TRUE)
```

## SessionInfo

```{r}
sessioninfo::session_info()
```
